fix-settings-persist-perf-2026-06-29.description: Fix: persist brightness/colour-temp/on-off; apply colour temp on all-monitors; cache JsonSerializerOptions

fix-persist-settings-2026-06-27.description: Fix: persist brightness and colour temperature across restarts (superseded by fix-settings-persist-perf-2026-06-29)

fix-hotkey-feedback-2026-06-27.description: Fix: notify user when global hotkey registration fails

improve-color-temp-hotkeys-2026-06-27.description: Improve: add global hotkeys for colour temperature (Ctrl+Shift+Left/Right)

improve-glow-color-temp-2026-06-28.description: Improve: tint glow shadow to match colour temperature

perf-geometry-dedup-2026-06-28.description: Perf: skip redundant geometry allocation in ApplyHolePunchEffect + AppSettings unit tests

feature-start-with-windows-2026-06-28.description: Feat: add Start with Windows toggle in system tray menu (registry HKCU\...\Run)

eng-updatum-1.4.0-2026-06-29.description: Eng: bump Updatum from 1.2.1 to 1.4.0 (latest). Note: 1.4.0 adds StageKit.Runtime transitive dep.

maintainer_preferences: Prefers bug fixes and functional improvements. Closed refactoring PRs as not_planned. Does not want pure refactors without user-visible benefit.

known_limitations.pr_creation: GitHub Actions cannot create PRs in this repo - needs Settings > Actions > General > Allow GitHub Actions to create and approve pull requests
known_limitations.workflow_files: GitHub Actions cannot push .github/workflows/ files - needs 'workflows' permission. CI workflow branches are always empty on GitHub.
known_limitations.updatum_1.4.0: 1.4.0 introduces StageKit.Runtime transitive dependency. Previous run chose 1.3.7 to avoid this. Now bumped to 1.4.0 since it's latest stable.

notes: 2026-06-29 run2 (14:12 UTC): Tasks 4+3. Task 4: Attempted CI workflow but can't push .github/workflows/ files (workflow permission). Created Updatum 1.4.0 bump branch. Task 3: No new user issues, all bugs already in branches. Only real user issue #24 (HDR) already commented, no new human activity. Monthly summary #86 updated. Next run: check if Updatum 1.4.0 branch was pushed; check for new issues from maintainer.
